message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Review Luca's Task #11 implementation now">
Luca has completed the Task #11 implementation (Navigation + Dashboard skeleton). Please review his work now and send your verdict to luca-palmieri.

Key files to review:
- `templates/gtd_nav.html` — the shared GTD nav partial
- `templates/dashboard.html` — dashboard with dl/dt/dd stats
- `src/routes/dashboard.rs` and `src/routes/gtd_placeholders.rs` — route handlers
- `static/css/main.css` — nav styles, quick capture, dashboard stats
- `templates/base.html` — hx-boost="true" on body
- `tests/api/dashboard.rs` — 8 new integration tests
- `e2e/user-journey.spec.ts` — updated e2e + axe-core dashboard scan

All tests pass (82 Rust + 7 Playwright). Review from your area of expertise and send approval or concerns to luca-palmieri. We need 9/9 consensus to commit.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already sent my detailed design review to Luca. Let me confirm with the team lead.

input.content:
I already reviewed Luca's implementation and sent my detailed feedback directly to him. Summary:

**Two CSS fixes needed before I approve:**
1. Active nav link text color: change from `--color-primary` to `--color-fg` (blue text on active page looks like a clickable link elsewhere)
2. Border thickness on nav links: change from 2px to 3px (per agreed spec with Lea)

**Three nice-to-haves deferred (won't block consensus):**
- Tier 2 weight differentiation on less-used nav links
- Dashboard stat cards as clickable links to their lists
- Stat card text centering

**Everything else approved:** `aria-current="page"`, `hx-boost` with auth opt-outs, semantic HTML (`<dl>`, `<ul role="list">`), token usage, quick capture skeleton, nav structure.

Once Luca makes the two CSS fixes, he has my full design approval for consensus.
input.summary: Review sent to Luca: 2 CSS fixes needed, then approved
